title: LAPM PM + Invoicing Operator Controls
intent: Low-risk planning/governance control pack for LAPM-style project control and consultant invoicing operations.

workflow_statuses.label: Not started
workflow_statuses.definition: No operator work has started on the evidence item or control bundle.

workflow_statuses.label: Collecting support
workflow_statuses.definition: Backing records are being assembled, but review has not started.

workflow_statuses.label: PM review
workflow_statuses.definition: Project manager or task lead is checking completeness, billing basis, and support quality.

workflow_statuses.label: Principal review
workflow_statuses.definition: Planner/principal review is required before the item may be labeled ready.

workflow_statuses.label: Hold
workflow_statuses.definition: A material gap, unresolved policy issue, or unsupported claim blocks readiness.

workflow_statuses.label: Approved
workflow_statuses.definition: Required support is complete for the intended internal/operator use.

lapm_readiness_statuses.label: Not assessed
lapm_readiness_statuses.definition: No LAPM readiness judgment has been made.

lapm_readiness_statuses.label: Internal control ready
lapm_readiness_statuses.definition: Usable for internal consultant operations, but not yet fit to claim LAPM-ready status.

lapm_readiness_statuses.label: Candidate
lapm_readiness_statuses.definition: Likely LAPM-aligned, but still awaiting citation completion, policy review, or signoff.

lapm_readiness_statuses.label: LAPM ready
lapm_readiness_statuses.definition: Safe to describe as LAPM-ready because exact citation, source traceability, and required approvals are complete.

lapm_readiness_statuses.label: Deferred
lapm_readiness_statuses.definition: Important work is intentionally parked from LAPM-ready claims pending missing authority, project phase, or closeout evidence.

lapm_readiness_statuses.label: Not applicable
lapm_readiness_statuses.definition: The control or citation does not apply to this project path and that disposition is documented.

invoice_lifecycle_statuses.label: Not started
invoice_lifecycle_statuses.definition: No invoice draft or pay estimate has been opened.

invoice_lifecycle_statuses.label: Drafting
invoice_lifecycle_statuses.definition: Costs, progress quantities, and support are being assembled into a draft invoice.

invoice_lifecycle_statuses.label: Internal review
invoice_lifecycle_statuses.definition: PM and reviewer are checking allowability, math, and support before release.

invoice_lifecycle_statuses.label: Approved for submission
invoice_lifecycle_statuses.definition: Internal release is complete and the invoice/pay estimate may be submitted.

invoice_lifecycle_statuses.label: Submitted
invoice_lifecycle_statuses.definition: The invoice or pay estimate has been transmitted to the client/agency.

invoice_lifecycle_statuses.label: Partially paid
invoice_lifecycle_statuses.definition: A payment was received, but not the full requested amount or not all line items are cleared.

invoice_lifecycle_statuses.label: Paid
invoice_lifecycle_statuses.definition: The invoice/pay estimate has been fully paid and reconciled.

invoice_lifecycle_statuses.label: Disputed
invoice_lifecycle_statuses.definition: The payer rejected or questioned part of the request and follow-up is open.

invoice_lifecycle_statuses.label: Closeout complete
invoice_lifecycle_statuses.definition: Final billing, reconciliation, and closeout documentation are complete.

lapm_ready_requires: Exact LAPM chapter or approved not-applicable disposition recorded.
Exact exhibit/form ID recorded when required by the evidence item; otherwise approved rationale for why no single form governs the item.
Revision date and source URL recorded from an auditable source.
Evidence item state is approved and workflow status is approved.
No unresolved Office Bulletin/LPP supersession conflict remains open.
Any required planning/legal/principal review is complete and dated.
must_use_deferred_or_internal_only_when: Placeholders such as PENDING_REVIEW remain in the record.
Only chapter-level intent is known, but exact form/exhibit applicability is unresolved.
The control is a good internal consultant SOP but has not been validated against current LAPM/LPP language.
The project phase has not yet produced the underlying field review, pay estimate, or closeout evidence.
Payment or closeout support is still draft, disputed, or missing subconsultant/final reconciliation inputs.
never_label_lapm_ready_when: Evidence is AI-generated or summary-only without human-reviewed source support.
Cost, invoice, or progress claims are based on unsupported percentages or informal email-only approvals.
A legal/policy conflict is known but not resolved or explicitly accepted in writing.
The only support is an internal work product with no auditable link to official source requirements where such linkage is required.

profiles.title: Invoicing controls and eligible cost protocol
profiles.goal: Set the billing basis and review chain before downstream draw activity starts.

operator_fields.label: Funding / delivery path
operator_fields.definition: Program and reimbursement path governing allowability and billing discipline.

operator_fields.label: Billing basis
operator_fields.definition: Commercial basis used for consultant billing and progress invoicing.

operator_fields.label: Progress billing frequency
operator_fields.definition: Planned cadence for invoice or pay estimate preparation.

operator_fields.label: Eligible cost basis note
operator_fields.definition: Short note identifying how allowability/eligibility will be checked.

operator_fields.label: Invoice review owner
operator_fields.definition: Primary internal reviewer who clears draft invoices before submission.

operator_fields.label: Backup document requirements
operator_fields.definition: Minimum support to retain with each invoice or pay estimate.

operator_fields.label: Policy delta check required
operator_fields.definition: Whether current LAPM/LPP/Office Bulletin deltas must be reviewed before using LAPM-ready language.

acceptance_criteria: Billing basis and progress billing cadence are selected.
Internal reviewer/approver is named.
Allowability or eligible-cost basis is documented in plain language.
Required invoice backup list is explicit.
Any required policy-delta review is assigned, not implied.
May be marked internal_control_ready before LAPM citation lock, but not lapm_ready without source-traceable citation fields.

profiles.title: Cost / invoicing update + field review disposition
profiles.goal: Tie cost updates and draw readiness to an actual field-review disposition instead of narrative-only status.

operator_fields.label: Current cost estimate date
operator_fields.definition: Date of the estimate supporting the current draw or budget statement.

operator_fields.label: Percent design / progress basis
operator_fields.definition: Human-readable basis for percent complete or design maturity used in the billing narrative.

operator_fields.label: Field review status
operator_fields.definition: Status of the field review or analogous site/design verification activity.

operator_fields.label: Scope delta flag
operator_fields.definition: Whether scope changes affect the cost/update package.

operator_fields.label: Invoice support complete
operator_fields.definition: Whether draw support is assembled well enough for internal release.

operator_fields.label: Open cost risk note
operator_fields.definition: Short note for unresolved estimate, utility, or ROW risk.

acceptance_criteria: Current estimate date is recorded.
Percent complete or design maturity basis is explicit and auditable.
Field review status is stated; if complete_with_open_items, unresolved items are noted.
Scope-change impact is acknowledged, not hidden.
Invoice support completeness is explicitly YES/NO.
Do not use lapm_ready if field review is deferred or if cost support is narrative-only.

profiles.title: Daily reports + progress payment records
profiles.goal: Make progress-payment readiness depend on quantity/support discipline, not just payment intent.

operator_fields.label: Payment application number
operator_fields.definition: Sequential invoice/pay estimate identifier.

operator_fields.label: Billing period end date
operator_fields.definition: End date for the period covered by the payment request.

operator_fields.label: Work progress basis
operator_fields.definition: Primary basis used to justify the requested payment.

operator_fields.label: Inspector / PM confirmation
operator_fields.definition: Whether responsible staff confirmed the work claimed for payment.

operator_fields.label: Disputed items flag
operator_fields.definition: Whether any claimed work is disputed or pending correction.

operator_fields.label: Invoice lifecycle status
operator_fields.definition: Current payment request status.

acceptance_criteria: Payment number and covered period are recorded.
Progress basis is explicit.
Inspector/PM confirmation is recorded before approved_for_submission.
Disputed items are visible rather than buried in notes.
Do not use lapm_ready if support is only draft, disputed, or missing quantity/daily-report linkage.

profiles.title: Change-order register + rationale
profiles.goal: Track whether change orders alter the payment basis, reimbursement eligibility, or closeout risk.

operator_fields.label: Change order ID
operator_fields.definition: Identifier used in the change-order register.

operator_fields.label: Cost impact status
operator_fields.definition: Disposition of added or reduced cost.

operator_fields.label: Time impact status
operator_fields.definition: Disposition of schedule impact.

operator_fields.label: Billing effect note
operator_fields.definition: Short explanation of whether the change affects current or future payment requests.

operator_fields.label: Funding eligibility recheck required
operator_fields.definition: Whether the change triggers a new allowability/reimbursement check.

acceptance_criteria: Cost and time effects are classified.
Billing effect is explained in plain language.
Eligibility recheck flag is explicit when scope/funding risk changes.
Do not call downstream invoice support ready if change-order billing effect remains unknown.

profiles.title: Final invoicing and financial closeout package
profiles.goal: Require final reconciliation discipline before any closeout package is described as complete or LAPM-ready.

operator_fields.label: Final invoice status
operator_fields.definition: Lifecycle state for the final invoice or reimbursement request.

operator_fields.label: Final cost reconciliation complete
operator_fields.definition: Whether budget, invoice total, and paid-to-date amounts reconcile.

operator_fields.label: Retention release status
operator_fields.definition: Status of retention release if applicable.

operator_fields.label: Subconsultant final received
operator_fields.definition: Whether all subconsultant finals have been received and checked.

operator_fields.label: Audit hold flag
operator_fields.definition: Whether audit/corrective action issues prevent final closeout.

operator_fields.label: Closeout approval date
operator_fields.definition: Date the final package was approved for archive/closeout.

acceptance_criteria: Final invoice lifecycle state is recorded.
Final reconciliation is complete.
Subconsultant finals are received and checked.
Any audit hold is visible.
Do not label the package complete or lapm_ready while final invoice is still drafting, disputed, or unreconciled.
